message.content: @startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center autonumber "[0]" box "Resident" #LightBlue2 participant Resident end box box "" #WhiteSmoke participant WeResident end box box "" #WhiteSmoke participant WeiD end box box "" #WhiteSkyBlue participant Weservice end box == Provider Login Into Provider App == activate Resident ->>WeResident : Send username:password /login\n alt [Provider already exist] ->WeiD:Get Token by \nusername:password \n/oauth/authorize -->>WeResident:Return Token to WeResident else end -->>Resident: Return {"token": "jwt-token"}\n deactivate Resident == Provider Query/Search Service = note right of WeResident:Query services including token\n/weservices/services \nHeader "Authorization:Bear {jwt-token}" -->Weservice:\n note left of WeResident:#Yellow;__Query Service schema#Black;\n{"query":"string","status":12}#white;/ alt[above token is valid ] <--WeiD:verify token -->WeiD:200 <-Resident:Response services data Note over Residnet,Weservice:#yellow;Service Data Array Schema:{[{\"id\":\"String\",\"company\": \"string\", \"name\": \"string\",\r\r\"rate\": 4.2,\"image\": \"Image.png\"},{},{}],{\"total\":10,\r\r\"currentPage\":1,\"perPage\":5}}#/ else[Token expired or invalid]\n <--WeiD: verify token -->WeiD:400 -<Weservice :\n Note Over weResident,weservice:#lightgreen ;Order Request Schema:{resident:$userID,service:$serviceId,PricingModel:{},"notedetail:string",address:"string,schedule:Time}\n#/ <-weiD:Verify token weiD-:>weResident:200 <<---resdient:response serivceData(JSON)\n comment(chat in order )POST:weserices/order{orderId}/comment ----> weservice:\n note over resident ,wesevice:#pink|Comment Data(content:\"string\")#\n <->weiD: Verify token weiD---->:weresident:200 weresident------>:resident:200 @enduml
